data_collected.title: 1. Data Collected
data_collected.p1: Our application, <0>Paul</0>, collects and stores data necessary for task management. This includes task content, project names, due dates, and your preferences.
data_collected.p2: When you create an account, we may store your name and email address to sync your data across devices.

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
usage.p1: Your data is used exclusively to facilitate your productivity. We organize your tasks and send you notifications for due dates. We do not use your task content for training AI models or for any advertising profiling.

storage.title: 3. Local vs. Cloud Storage
storage.p1: We prioritize your privacy by keeping most of your data in your device's local storage.
storage.p2: If you use our cloud sync feature, your tasks are encrypted during transmission and when stored on our secure servers.

sharing.title: 4. Sharing and Disclosure
sharing.p1: We <0>NEVER</0> sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal data to third parties. Your productivity is private.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.p1: You have the right to access, export, or delete all your data at any time. Within the app settings, you can clear your local storage or delete your account.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.p1: By accessing or using <0>Paul</0>, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to all these terms, you may not use the application.

description.title: 2. Description of Service
description.p1: Paul is a task management application designed to help you organize your productivity. We provide tools to create, manage, and sync tasks across your devices.

responsibilities.title: 3. User Responsibilities
responsibilities.p1: You are responsible for the content you create within the app. You agree not to use the service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
responsibilities.p2: You must maintain the security of your account and notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

property.title: 4. Intellectual Property
property.p1: The application, including its design, code, and original content, is the property of Paul Application. You may not reproduce or distribute any part of the service without our permission.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: Paul is provided "as is" without any warranties. We are not liable for any data loss or productivity issues resulting from the use of the application.

modifications.title: 6. Modifications
modifications.p1: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Your continued use of the app after such changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

task_not_found.title: Task not found
task_not_found.description: We couldn't find the task you're looking for. It might have been deleted.

hero.description: Paul is here to help you achieve your goals, one task at a time.

clarity.title: Mental Clarity
clarity.description: Stop holding everything in your head. Paul is designed to help you offload your thoughts instantly so you can actually focus on working.

distractions.title: Zero Distractions
distractions.description: Most apps are cluttered with features you'll never use. We keep it simple: one list, one goal, and a pure sense of accomplishment.

priorities.title: Master Priorities
priorities.description: Instantly mark what's critical and what can wait. Our visual hierarchy ensures you always know your most important next step.

followups.title: Smart Follow-ups
followups.description: Get gentle nudges that keep you moving forward. We handle the reminders so you can keep your focus where it belongs: on the task.

before.title: Before Paul
before.subtitle: Scattered thoughts, missed deadlines, and total mental clutter.

after.title: With Paul
after.subtitle: Laser focus, clear priorities, and the peace of a finished list.

preview.title: Everything in its place.
preview.subtitle: A clean, distract-free environment built for modern focus.

pricing.title: Choose Focus.
pricing.subtitle: Get started for free or unlock the full power of Paul

started.title: Started
started.description: Everything you need to stop holding tasks in your head.

pro.title: Pro
pro.description: Unlock the full potential of your focus and workflow.

cta.title: Stop Overcomplicating.
cta.subtitle: Start getting your life in order today.

testimonials.title: They chose to focus.
testimonials.subtitle: Join those who are already simplifying their lives this week.

joander.name: Joander Santos
joander.content: Apple Reminders is life. I don't believe anyone will use this app.

marcotulio.name: Marco Túlio
marcotulio.content: In the AI era, and this app wants to organize tasks? HAHAHAHAHAH

pablo.name: Pablo Alves
pablo.content: The aesthetic of this app matches exactly what I don't need.

thiago.name: Thiago Cantuário
thiago.content: I can manage all my projects in Notion and Google Keep.

metadata.title: Paul, Your Task Assistant
metadata.description: Paul is a task assistant that helps you manage your tasks and stay organized.
